title: Rapid Technology Assessment: Metamaterials
body: "This report is a summary of a project completed in April 2024 (information cut-off date January 2024). This report provides an introduction to metamaterials, recent developments, opportunities, and challenges identified through research and discussions with a range of experts.  We would like to thank the following for their contribution and expert review:     Prof Alastair Hibbins    Prof Robert Hicken    Dr Katie Shanks    Dr Henry Marsh    Dr Claire Dancer    Dr Simon Pope    Dr Stephen Henthorn    Prof Sajad Haq    Mike Sloan    Jan Taylor    Dr Alex Broomsgrove    Prof Mike Hinton    MoD, DSTL, and DSIT    "
